title: "NEXT_PHASE"
description: "Environment variable used by: hera"

# `NEXT_PHASE`

**Read by:** `hera`

**Sensitive:** No — safe to log / share.

**Required:** unspecified

## Where it's read

- **hera** — `grep -r "NEXT_PHASE" ../hera/src` for code locations

## Setting it

### Dev

Set in your local `.env.dev` file (managed by `octl deploy`).

### Prod

```bash
gh secret set NEXT_PHASE --body "<value>" -R OlympusOSS/platform
gh workflow run deploy.yml
```
